name: SAP Concur
description: Monitor employee access and sync users from SAP Concur expense management platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign in to SAP Concur at https://www.concursolutions.com
2. Go to Administration > Company > Authentication Admin
3. Click 'Manage Apps' to create or manage OAuth2 applications
4. Create a new app with scopes: user.provision.read, identity.user.core.read, identity.user.enterprise.read
5. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
6. Enter your datacenter prefix (found in your Concur URL, e.g. us2 for US, eu2 for EU, apj1 for Asia-Pacific)
7. Optionally enter your Company UUID from Administration > Company > Company Profile
8. Paste all values below

credentialFields.label: Datacenter
credentialFields.helpText: Your SAP Concur datacenter prefix. Common values: us2 (US), eu2 (EU), apj1 (Asia-Pacific), usg (Government). Found in your Concur URL or the geolocation field from your OAuth token response.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in SAP Concur Administration > Company > Authentication Admin > Manage Apps. Create an OAuth2 app or use an existing Client ID.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The Client Secret from your registered OAuth2 application in SAP Concur.

credentialFields.label: Company UUID
credentialFields.helpText: Your SAP Concur company UUID. Found in Administration > Company > Company Profile, or from the companyId field in the SCIM user enterprise extension.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all SAP Concur users and verifies active account status for compliance evidence
